Simon Harmer Dominated ICC Player Awards

Dec 6, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

Simon Harmer Dominated ICC Player Awards

Simon Harmer has become one of the most talked-about names in world cricket after his extraordinary performance in South Africa’s 2-0 Test series win over India, leading to his nomination for the ICC Player of the Month award for November.

His dominance, control, and consistency across both matches have placed him at the centre of global discussion, setting the tone for one of the most memorable bowling campaigns of recent years.

You can read the full original article on 8jjsports.com here: 👉 Simon Harmer Dominated ICC Player Awards
